title: Request Targets, Host Authority, Client Identity, and Proxy Trust · Failure Repair Bay
summary: An incident responder inherits a plausible but defective request authority and trusted-proxy decision record; retain the failing request and response, isolate the first causal server boundary, and keep a regression probe. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in request authority and trusted-proxy decision record and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence…
objectives: Interpret Method, URL, Host, RequestURI, Header, Body, Trailer, RemoteAddr, TLS, Pattern, and Context using server-side semantics.
Validate authoritative host and port against a configured allowlist before routing, link construction, cache keys, or tenant selection.
Accept Forwarded or X-Forwarded values only from configured proxy hops and derive client, scheme, and host with a documented traversal rule.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go server Inspect the failure record · Debug Server Request Field Meaning
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug team handles case 9826 in a internal administrative API crossing two trust zones. Build deterministic Go evidence to derive effective authority only through an explicit trusted-proxy boundary; then remove one trusted intermediary and recompute authority without forwarded fields. Browser code models decisions only. Listener, TLS, database, proxy, race, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Interpret Method, URL, Host, RequestURI, Header, Body, Trailer, RemoteAddr, TLS, Pattern, and Context using server-side semantics.

Inspect the Server Request Field Meaning trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Go server Inspect the failure record · Debug Server Request Field Meaning.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for interpret method, url, host, requesturi, header, body, trailer, remoteaddr, tls, pattern, and context using server-side semantics. For Go server Inspect the failure record · Debug Server Request Field Meaning, keep Server Request Field Meaning connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.
